heading: Authorization of appropriations and conservation technical assistance funds
label: 590f Authorization of appropriations and conservation technical assistance funds
notes: Amendments2013— inserted section catchline, designated existing provisions as subsec. (a), inserted heading, substituted “There is authorized” for “There are hereby authorized”, and added subsec. (b).Pub. L. 113–671944—Act , inserted second par.Sept. 21, 1944
amendments: Amendments2013— inserted section catchline, designated existing provisions as subsec. (a), inserted heading, substituted “There is authorized” for “There are hereby authorized”, and added subsec. (b).Pub. L. 113–671944—Act , inserted second par.Sept. 21, 1944

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: a Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated for the purposes of this chapter such sums as Congress may from time to time determine to be necessary.Appropriations for carrying out this chapter allocated for the production or procurement of nursery stock by any Federal agency, or funds appropriated to any Federal agency for allocation to cooperating States for the production or procurement of nursery stock, shall remain available for expenditure for not more than three fiscal years.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: There is established in the Treasury of the United States a fund to be known as the “Conservation Technical Assistance Fund” (referred to in this subsection as the “Fund”), to be administered by the Secretary of Agriculture.

children.heading: Deposits
children.label: 2 Deposits
children.text: An amount equal to the amounts collected as fees under and late payments, interest, and such other amounts as are authorized to be collected pursuant to shall be deposited in the Fund.section 590c(4) of this titlesection 3717 of title 31

children.label: A
children.text: only be available to the extent and in the amount provided in advance in appropriations Acts;

children.label: B
children.text: be used for the costs of carrying out this chapter; and
